raw.raw_text: Every ~15 minutes I get kicked back to the login screen while working in the dashboard. Super frustrating because I lose my query state. Happens on Chrome and Safari, both incognito and regular. Observed: redirected to /login with no warning. Expected: session stays active while I am actively using the app.

fields.body: Every ~15 minutes I get kicked back to the login screen while working in the dashboard. Super frustrating because I lose my query state. Happens on Chrome and Safari, both incognito and regular. Observed: redirected to /login with no warning. Expected: session stays active while I am actively using the app.
reproduction_steps: Work on the dashboard using Chrome or Safari, in either incognito or regular mode.
Every ~15 minutes, get redirected to the login screen.
fields.expected_result: session stays active while I am actively using the app

severity_rationale: user_auth critical path mandates at least S1 severity.

analysis.impact_summary: Frequent session timeouts causing user frustration and loss of work state in dashboard use cases.
risk_rationale: Details are clear, but duration of 15 minutes warrants backup checks to rule out local network or system issues.
Could be device-specific yet reproducible across two major browsers.
self_concerns: severity may be too low — impact scope unclear from raw text
analysis.narration: The report describes a recurring issue where the user is logged out every 15 minutes while using the dashboard, leading to loss of query state. This affects the user authentication path and is classified as a bug with S1 severity due to its frequency and user impact. Further details on the environment might be needed to rule out external factors.
